title: Kahleeko Sik

'''Kahleeko Sik''' was a [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the<ref name="SW:BH" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Naboo">{{DB|location|naboo|Naboo}}</ref> [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="SW:BH" /> An extortion kingpin, he<ref name="BHGuide" /> was affiliated with [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] and [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] street gangs.<ref name="SW:BH" /> By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date2">''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'' is set immediately after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> a four thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty was placed on Sik, as he wanted [[Death/Legends|dead]] for extortion by an anonymous originator. His last known location was the<ref name="SW:BH" /> planet<ref name="Coruscant">{{DB|location|coruscant|Coruscant}}</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and he was listed to be exterminated with "extreme prejudice."<ref name="SW:BH" /> 

In 32 BBY,<ref name="Date2" /> Sik was standing on a balcony in the Outlander Club, an establishment in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of Coruscant,<ref name="FF44">{{FactFile|44|COR 21-22|Coruscant – Outlander Club}}</ref> when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] entered. Sik had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="SW:BH" />

{{Gamemechanics|legends=1}}
When Fett landed on the balcony, Sik began to shoot at him. However, Fett killed Sik and claimed the bounty.<ref name="SW:BH" />
{{Endgame}}
